cases.prompt: Audit the docs — it's been a heavy month of changes.
Check for stale docs: README still mentions the old CLI name.
Are the git hooks still firing?
Summarize the plot of Romeo and Juliet in three sentences.
Suggest a name for a new coffee shop downtown.
Clean up the shape of this settled diff — dead code and duplication only.
cases.notes: that's simplify (code quality), not prose/doc drift
